text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
We planned to go to karaoke all together, but...
it looks like we should probably call the whole
thing off.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Aww, I don't care a continental about this much
drizzle! Dober, you went to the trouble of invitin'
everyone, so don't hang your fiddle up just yet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But when the rain's this heavy, we'll get soaked
even if we take umbrellas...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I see it! The divination has arrived! My sunfish
charm is telling me that... shouting while it's
raining will bring great luck!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This is surely a divine message telling us to go to
karaoke as planned! We're guaranteed to receive
a jumbo-sized portion of luck if we do!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wowie! A certified shot at some good fortune!
Yeeehaw! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What are you two saying? You're going to catch
colds! Just be patient!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
She's right. We should at least hold off a little to
see whether the rain eases up...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka, Dober, c'mon now! If we sprint clear
through that rain, I reckon we'll see ourselves
some pretty sights!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: W-wait! Is that all it took to convince you?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Don't be a stick-in-the-mud now, Dober! ♪ Let's
shoot on over to that karaoke joint lickety-split,
and sing till this silly ol' rain calls it quits! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I suppose I have no other option...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But I'm bringing some towels at the very least! All
of you, just wait right here!
